scenes.headline: Three returns. Same RM300.
scenes.body: 8% equity returns. 4% fixed deposit. 0% under the mattress. The gap at year 30 is the cost of staying safe.

thumbnailBrief: Authoritative data-driven tone. Chart is the hero — all three lines visible, 8% line emphasized in orange (winning the comparison), 4% in navy (baseline), 0% in muted grey (losing). Headline above chart, source citation below. Calm, serious.
